g.text: read spec, status, delete intent, and OCI lifecycle
- Wallet Secret cleanup is ownership-filtered and legacy
- The formal secret-delete profile is stronger than current
code because wallet cleanup is still best-effort.
- Record the returned delete work-request ID for operator
visibility without using it as the confirmation source.
- Confirm deletion with GetAutonomousDatabase until the
OCI state in PROVISIONING, UPDATING, STARTING, STOPPING, MAINTENANCE_IN_PROGRESS, RESTARTING, SCALE_IN_PROGRESS, BACKUP_IN_PROGRESS, RESTORE_IN_PROGRESS
OCI state in FAILED, UNAVAILABLE, TERMINATING, TERMINATED, RESTORE_FAILED, INACCESSIBLE
unsupported or immutable drift is detected
wait for the spec or live state to change
owned Secret cleanup fails after OCI delete
retry Secret cleanup until completion is allowed
